steps.title: Identify the time reference
steps.content: ”Even back in the 1860s” establishes a past time period.

steps.title: Apply past tense to match the time reference
steps.content: ”was” is the past tense form that fits the singular subject and the 1860s time reference. The other three choices use present or future tense, incompatible with the past. That matches choice B — B is correct.
